title: Thoughts and things on 2/15/23 (the productive-hamster note)
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir names his 2023 spring as the "productive hamster on a hamster wheel" — busy beyond most people, going nowhere.
  • Most explicit-to-date journal-entry on questioning his sexuality — concludes he sexually desires women but craves a "co-adventurer" partnership that could, in extremis, be a male non-sexual companion.
  • Frames the desire as a lynchpin life companion — "I would give up all forms of sex if I had the ultimate partner to duel the world with."
  • Surfaces a feared scenario: "during a moment of severe drunkenness I will pull a Gabe at the shed" — references a specific past incident; Gabe stays first-name-only, queue.
  • Lists investment group and pickleball as the only current eustress sources; everything else feels like "lacking on my potential."

Notes

The doc opens with The Weeknd's Dawn FM "Out of Time" / Dancing in the Flames references and Radiohead's In Rainbows — the soundtrack of his February 2023. The Joker dancing alone image surfaces — same body-as-uninhibited-instrument idea that connects to the tattoo as stain anxiety two months later. The sexuality passage is significant for the corpus: "this is the first time I am admitting to this" — explicitly first-time framing. He immediately self-checks "I sound like I am justifying something" and lands on the companion not sex reframe. Closes with the "go fast but see things slow" maxim and his "Yahir Gonzalez" full-name sign-off — the "YG" tag has matured.

Connections

  • lynchpin life companion · hamster wheel as anti pattern · joker as self image
  • osig · pickleball · the weeknd · radiohead
  • 2023 04 21 thoughts about tattoo · 2022 10 15 summer 2022 · 2023 05 05 happy birthday poem
  • sexuality questioning · disconnected from outcome
